name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Brands and creators expanding into new markets face the costly, time-consuming task of recreating video graphics and text overlays for each language. Existing translation tools handle voiceover or subtitles but leave on-screen text untouched, forcing teams to reopen source files or rebuild assets from scratch. Visual Translate automates the detection and replacement of in-video text while preserving the original design and layout.
useCases: Localizing product demo videos with on-screen labels for international markets
Translating tutorial or how-to videos with text callouts for multilingual audiences
Adapting social media video ads with text overlays for regional campaigns
Updating training or onboarding videos with translated UI annotations without redesign
